pi_items.source: Verified against task description and export_result.sh.
Examined the generated GPX data in setup_task.sh. The elevations in meters (<ele> tag) converted to feet (using 1m=3.28ft) are exactly within the inclusive 200 ft - 400 ft range.
Examined the generated GPX data in setup_task.sh. Elevations are correctly verified to be outside the 200 ft - 400 ft range.

privileged_info_summary: The GPX data for amphibian sightings is synthetically generated inside the setup_task.sh script. The waypoint <ele> values (provided in meters) strictly correlate with the <desc> labels (in feet). When applying the mathematical conversion of meters to feet, waypoints Sighting_03 to Sighting_07 exclusively fall within the targeted 200 to 400 ft elevation band.
